titleStmt.title: SII 9.231: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 231. (A.R. No. 673 of 1917.) ON A SLAB LYING IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE FOUR-TEMPLES AT KOLIMIGUNDLA KOILKUNTLA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year [5*]8, Ānanda, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1134 December 25 Tuesday, (not verifiable) It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Bhūlōkamalladēva ruling from Kalyāṇa and mentions his feudatory Vaṅkaṇa-Chōḷamahārāja ruling from Nandyāla. The latter is said to have made a gift of 2 mattars of land, a flower garden and an oil-mill for the service of the god Kēśavadēva, set up by Muppiraṭi, the chief of Kolmaguḍi, and for the subsistence of the priest Vāsyaṇa-Bhaṭṭa. The writer was Rēvarāja and the engraver Bammōja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhūlōkamalladēvaru kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷu rājyaṁ
geyyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti samasta
prasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vaṁkaṇa
cōḷamahārājaru haṁḍakallu kannenāḍu rēnā
ḍu ma ḍi naṁdyāleya bīḍikeyalu rā
jyaṁgeyyuttamire cāḷukyavikramagālada 58
neyānaṁdasaṁvatsarada Uttarāyaṇasaṁ
krāṁtinimittadiṁ kolmaguḍi prabhu muppiraṭi mā
ḍisida kēśavadēvargge pūjāpunaskārakke pūjāri
vāsyaṇabhaṭṭaṁge kalukuṁṭaya dāriyalu ko
ṭṭa matta 2 pūdōṁṭa voṁdu dēvagāṇavoṁdumaṁ
Ekkaṭigarnnālvattumānasarumirddu barayisida
śāsana bareda karaṇaṁ rēvarājaṁ kāsiga ba
mmōja . I dharmmavaṁ kiḍisidavaru gaṁgevāra
ṇāsiyalu sāsira kavile sāsira brāhma
ṇa vadhisida dōṣa .
Digital edition of SII 9.231 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
